sqlMap.select: SELECT TASKID, CREATORID, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN CREATORNAME ELSE CREATORNAME2 END AS CREATORNAME, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN CREATORDEPTNAME ELSE CREATORDEPTNAME2 END AS CREATORDEPTNAME, CREATOREMAIL, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CREATEDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')+(#offset#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATEDATE, TASKSTATUS, COMPLETERATE, IMPORTANCE, HASSHARE, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')+(#offset#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')+(#offset#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ENDDATE, TITLE, CONTENTPATH, TASKTYPE, UPDATETIME, PERSONID, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN PERSONNAME ELSE PERSONNAME2 END AS PERSONNAME, PERSONNAME AS PERSONNAME1, PERSONNAME2, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN PERSONDEPTNAME ELSE PERSONDEPTNAME2 END AS PERSONDEPTNAME, PERSONDEPTNAME AS PERSONDEPTNAME1, PERSONDEPTNAME2, PERSONEMAIL, PERSONATTACH, PERSONCONTENTPATH, MEMO, REPETITION, TOTALREP, COMPANYID FROM TBL_TASK WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID# AND COMPANYID = #companyID#

SELECT TASKID, COMMENTID, COMMENTORID, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN COMMENTORNAME ELSE COMMENTORNAME2 END AS COMMENTORNAME, COMMENTDATE + (#offset#/(24*60)) AS COMMENTDATE, T_COMMENT AS "COMMENT" FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#

SELECT SHARERID, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN SHARERNAME ELSE SHARERNAME2 END AS SHARERNAME, SHARERNAME AS SHARERNAME1, SHARERNAME2, CASE WHEN #primary# = 1 THEN SHARERDEPTNAME ELSE SHARERDEPTNAME2 END AS SHARERDEPTNAME, SHARERDEPTNAME2, SHAREREMAIL FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#
SELECT TASKID, ATTACHID, FILENAME, FILEPATH, FILESIZE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID# AND TYPE = #type#

SELECT NVL((SELECT DELAYCOLOR FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#), '##FF1B1B') AS DELAYCOLOR, NVL((SELECT COMPLETECOLOR FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#), '##8DFF1B') AS COMPLETECOLOR, NVL((SELECT ORIGINCOLOR FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#), '') AS ORIGINCOLOR, NVL((SELECT ORIGINCOLOR2 FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND USERID = #userID#), '') AS ORIGINCOLOR2, USERID FROM TBL_TASKCONFIG WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

SELECT DISTINCT(A.TASKID), CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, CREATORDEPTNAME, CREATORDEPTNAME2, CREATOREMAIL, IMPORTANCE, HASATTACH, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')+(#offset#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')+(#offset#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ENDDATE, TITLE, TASKTYPE, TASKSTATUS, COMPLETERATE, PERSONID, PERSONNAME, PERSONNAME2, PERSONDEPTNAME, PERSONDEPTNAME2, PERSONEMAIL, HASCOMMENT, MEMO, REPETITION, TOTALREP FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID WHERE A.TENANTID = #tenantID# and A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID#
( (TASKSTATUS = 3 AND (A.TASKTYPE = 1 OR A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (A.TOTALREP != -1 AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND ENDDATE <= #today#) ) )
( (TASKSTATUS != 3 AND (A.TASKTYPE = 1 OR A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (A.TOTALREP = -1 OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND ENDDATE > #today#) ) )
((A.CREATORID = #userID# AND A.TASKTYPE = 1) OR (A.PERSONID = #userID#) OR (B.SHARERID = #userID# and A.TASKID = B.TASKID))
(A.CREATORID = #userID# AND (A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6))
((A.CREATORID = #userID# AND A.TASKTYPE = 4) OR (A.PERSONID = #userID#) OR (B.SHARERID = #userID# and A.TASKID = B.TASKID))
TITLE LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME2 LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
TASKSTATUS = 1
(TASKSTATUS = 1 OR TASKSTATUS = 2)
TASKSTATUS = 3
TASKSTATUS = 4
((STARTDATE >= #startDate# AND STARTDATE <= #endDate#) OR (ENDDATE >= #startDate# AND ENDDATE < #endDate#) OR (STARTDATE < #startDate# AND ENDDATE >= #endDate#) OR TASKTYPE = 4 OR TASKTYPE = 5 OR TASKTYPE = 6) AND (A.PERSONID = #userID# OR (B.SHARERID = #userID# AND A.TASKID = B.TASKID) OR A.CREATORID = #userID#)
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC, A.TASKID DESC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') + (#offset#/(60*24)), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STARTDATE FROM TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# AND DELETESTATUS = 1

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.TASKID)) FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID WHERE A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND ((A.CREATORID = #userID# AND A.TASKTYPE = 1) OR (A.PERSONID = #userID# AND (A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (B.SHARERID = #userID# AND A.TASKID = B.TASKID AND (A.TASKTYPE = 1 OR A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)))
TASKSTATUS = 3
TASKSTATUS != 3
TITLE LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME2 LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.TASKID)) FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID WHERE A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND (A.CREATORID = #userID# AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3) OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.TOTALREP != 0)))
( (TASKSTATUS = 3 AND (A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (A.TOTALREP != -1 AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.ENDDATE <= #today#) ) )
( (TASKSTATUS != 3 AND (A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (A.TOTALREP = -1 OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.ENDDATE > #today#) ) )
TITLE LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME2 LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.TASKID)) FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID WHERE A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND ( ((A.CREATORID = #userID#) AND (A.TASKTYPE = 4 AND A.TOTALREP != 0)) OR ((B.SHARERID = #userID# AND A.TASKID = B.TASKID) AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.TOTALREP != 0)) OR (A.PERSONID = #userID# AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.TOTALREP != 0) ) )
( (TASKSTATUS = 3 AND (A.TASKTYPE = 1 OR A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (A.TOTALREP != -1 AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.ENDDATE <= #today#) ) )
( (TASKSTATUS != 3 AND (A.TASKTYPE = 1 OR A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3)) OR (A.TOTALREP = -1 OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.ENDDATE > #today#) ) )
TITLE LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME2 LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT(A.TASKID)) FROM TBL_TASK A LEFT JOIN TBL_TASKSHARE B ON A.TENANTID = B.TENANTID WHERE A.TENANTID = #tenantID# AND A.companyid = #v_COMPANYID# AND ( (A.CREATORID = #userID# AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3 OR A.TASKTYPE = 1) OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.TOTALREP != 0))) OR (A.PERSONID = #userID# AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3 OR A.TASKTYPE = 1) OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.TOTALREP != 0))) OR ((B.SHARERID = #userID# AND A.TASKID = B.TASKID) AND ((A.TASKTYPE = 2 OR A.TASKTYPE = 3 OR A.TASKTYPE = 1) OR ((A.TASKTYPE = 4 OR A.TASKTYPE = 5 OR A.TASKTYPE = 6) AND A.TOTALREP != 0))) )
TITLE LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
PERSONNAME2 LIKE '%' || #filter# || '%'
SELECT USERID, LISTCOUNT, SELECTTASKSTATUS FROM TBL_TASKGENERAL WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_TASK (TASKID, CREATORID, CREATORNAME, CREATORNAME2, CREATORDEPTNAME, CREATORDEPTNAME2, CREATOREMAIL, CREATEDATE, TASKSTATUS, COMPLETERATE, IMPORTANCE, HASSHARE, HASATTACH, HASCOMMENT, STARTDATE, ENDDATE, TITLE, CONTENTPATH, TASKTYPE, UPDATETIME, PERSONID, PERSONNAME, PERSONNAME2, PERSONDEPTNAME, PERSONDEPTNAME2, PERSONEMAIL, PERSONATTACH, MEMO, REPETITION, TOTALREP, TENANTID, companyid) VALUES
(SEQ_TBL_TASK.NEXTVAL, #creatorID#, #creatorName#, #creatorName2#, #creatorDeptName#, #creatorDeptName2#, #creatorEmail#, #nowDate#, #taskStatus#, 0, #importance#, #hasShare#, #hasAttach#, 'N', #startDate#, #endDate#, #title#, #contentPath#, #taskType#, #nowDate#, #personID#, #personName#, #personName2#, #personDeptName#, #personDeptName2#, #personEmail#, 'N', NVL(#memo#, ' '), #repetition#, #totalrepetition#, #tenantID#, #v_COMPANYID#)
SELECT SEQ_TBL_TASK.CURRVAL FROM DUAL

INSERT INTO TBL_TASKSHARE (TASKID, SHARERID, SHARERNAME, SHARERNAME2, SHARERDEPTNAME, SHARERDEPTNAME2, SHAREREMAIL, UPDATETIME, TENANTID) VALUES (#taskID#, #sharerID#, #sharerName#, #sharerName2#, #sharerDeptName#, #sharerDeptName2#, #sharerEmail#, TO_DATE(#nowDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (USERID, DELAYCOLOR, COMPLETECOLOR, ORIGINCOLOR, ORIGINCOLOR2, TENANTID) VALUES (#memberID#, #delayColor#, #completeColor#, #originColor#, #originColor2#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKATTACH (TASKID, FILESIZE, FILENAME, FILEPATH, TYPE, TENANTID) VALUES (#taskID#, #fileSize#, #fileName#, #filePath#, #taskType#, #tenantID#)
INSERT INTO TBL_TASKGENERAL (USERID, LISTCOUNT, SELECTTASKSTATUS, TENANTID) VALUES (#userID#, #listCount#, #selectTaskStatus#, #tenantID#)

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT TASKID , REPEATCOUNT , TENANTID FROM TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND STARTDATE = #startDate# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS SET DELETESTATUS = 1 WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND STARTDATE = #startDate# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET IMPORTANCE = #importance#, HASSHARE = #hasShare#, HASATTACH = #hasAttach#, STARTDATE = #startDate#, ENDDATE = #endDate#, TITLE = #title#, TASKTYPE = #taskType#, UPDATETIME = #nowDate#, PERSONID = #personID#, PERSONNAME = #personName#, PERSONNAME2 = #personName2#, PERSONDEPTNAME = #personDeptName#, PERSONDEPTNAME2 = #personDeptName2#, PERSONEMAIL = #personEmail#, MEMO = #memo#, REPETITION = #repetition#, TOTALREP = #totalrepetition# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET STARTDATE = #startDate# WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET HASCOMMENT=#hasComment# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET HASCOMMENT=#hasComment# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID# AND 0 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#)

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCOMMENT (TASKID, COMMENTORID, COMMENTORNAME, COMMENTORNAME2, COMMENTDATE, T_COMMENT, TENANTID) VALUES (#taskID#, #commentorID#, #commentorName#, #commentorName2#, TO_DATE(#nowDate#,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #comment#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET TASKSTATUS = #taskStatus#, COMPLETERATE = #completeRate# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#

insert.selectKey: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT TASKID , REPEATCOUNT , TENANTID FROM TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND STARTDATE = #realDate# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# )
insert.isNotEqual: UPDATE TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS SET COMPLETERATE = #completeRate#, TASKSTATUS = #taskStatus# WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND STARTDATE = #realDate# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TASK SET PERSONATTACH = #personAttach#, PERSONCONTENTPATH = #personContentPath# WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKCONFIG SET DELAYCOLOR = #delayColor#, COMPLETECOLOR = #completeColor#, ORIGINCOLOR = #originColor#, ORIGINCOLOR2 = #originColor2# WHERE USERID = #memberID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASK SET TOTALREP = TOTALREP - 1 WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
UPDATE TBL_TASKGENERAL SET LISTCOUNT = #listCount#, SELECTTASKSTATUS = #selectTaskStatus# WHERE USERID = #userID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_TASKCOMMENT WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID# AND COMMENTID = #commentID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID# AND TYPE = #attachType#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASK WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKSHARE WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKATTACH WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND TENANTID = #tenantID#
DELETE FROM TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS WHERE TENANTID = #tenantID# AND TASKID = #taskID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL ( (SELECT COMPLETERATE FROM TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND STARTDATE = #date# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# ), 0) FROM DUAL
SELECT NVL ( (SELECT TASKSTATUS FROM TBL_TASKINSTANCESTATUS WHERE TASKID = #taskID# AND STARTDATE = #date# AND TENANTID = #tenantID# ), 0) FROM DUAL
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TASKCONFIG (USERID, DELAYCOLOR, COMPLETECOLOR, ORIGINCOLOR, ORIGINCOLOR2, TENANTID) VALUES (#userID#, #initColor#, #initColor2# , ' ' , ' ' , #tenantID#)
